kev_recent.vulnerabilityName: Google Chromium V8 Improper Restriction of Operations Within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer Vulnerability
kev_recent.shortDescription: Google Chromium V8 contains an improper restriction of operations within the bounds of a memory buffer vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.
kev_recent.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

kev_recent.shortDescription: Google Skia contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to perform out of bounds memory access via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability affects Google Chrome and ChromeOS, Android, Flutter, and possibly other products.
kev_recent.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
kev_recent.notes: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://chromereleases.googleblog.com/2026/03/stable-channel-update-for-desktop_12.html#:~:text=Google%20is%20aware ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3909

kev_recent.vulnerabilityName: n8n Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources Vulnerability
kev_recent.shortDescription: n8n contains an improper control of dynamically managed code resources vulnerability in its workflow expression evaluation system that allows for remote code execution.
kev_recent.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
